title: Church Pew with Worshippers
summary: Church Pew with Worshippers is a watercolor created in September–October 1882 by Vincent van Gogh. A sketch of the painting was included in a letter van Gogh sent to his brother Theo that mentions the work.
text: Church Pew with Worshippers is a watercolor created in September–October 1882 by Vincent van Gogh. A sketch of the painting was included in a letter van Gogh sent to his brother Theo that mentions the work.
